title: Why do you need Sunday off? Supreme Court Justice Aravind Kumar to young lawyers
description: Supreme Court Justice Aravind Kumar on Saturday urged young lawyers to adopt a culture of discipline and long working hours and cautioned against the growing tendency of young lawyer to take weekends off early in their careers.He said that commitment to the profession is essential for success and cannot be achieved by limiting working hours. In this regard, he highlighted how he had no “You should be wedded to your profession and only when you dedicate yourself to what you are doing, the results
